title: Alsophila ivohibensis
taxonomy: Alsophila ivohibensis is classified as a species of tree fern within the genus Alsophila, which is a group of ferns belonging to the family Cyathea. This plant is native to Madagascar, and the genus Alsophila is commonly found in tropical regions of the world. The family Cyathea is part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. Alsophila ivohibensis is further classified as a member of the order Cyatheales, which is a group of tree ferns. The species is also known to be a relatively rare and endangered plant.
